name: Beijing Chieftain Control Engineering Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Chieftain Control Engineering Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells production process automation systems for the biological and pharmaceutical industries in China. The company offers CTN production process control systems; fermentation production process control systems; and continuous offline automatic control systems. It also provides automatic control systems for starch production, starch sugar production, and fructose production, as well as solutions for the pulverization, mixing, and dispensing of sterile APIs. The company's products are used in the pharmaceutical, chemical, food, additive, power, and other fields. Beijing Chieftain Control Engineering Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Beijing, China.
